title: 10 best herbal tinctures for heartburn
description: Fennel tinctures helps with heartburn because of its natural ability to reduce inflammation and ease digestive discomfort. The volatile oils present in fennel, such as anethole and fenchol, have a soothing effect on the esophagus and stomach lining, which can become irritated due to acid reflux. Additionally, fennel's carminative properties help to expel gas and reduce bloating, further alleviating symptoms of heartburn. By targeting these underlying causes, herbal fennel tinctures pro...
